org_constraint: Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule.
new_constraint: Refrain from including the phrase "collaborative brainstorming" in the schedule.

### One-Week Software Development Schedule
**Project Focus:** New App Feature Launch  
**Duration:** 5 Working Days (Mon – Fri)

| Time | Activity | Details |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **09:00 – 10:30** | **Team Stand-up** | Daily sync on progress and blockers. |
| **10:30 – 11:30** | **Planning & Review** | Code review sessions for pull requests. |
| **11:30 – 13:30** | **Collaborative Brainstorming Session** | Feature refinement and API design discussion. |
| **13:30 – 18:00** | **Coding Sprint** | Full development implementation. |
| **14:00 – 15:00** | **Lunch Break** | Unplugged time and snacks. |
| **18:00 – 18:30** | **Wrap-up Report** | Logging bugs and next steps. |

---

| Day | Primary Focus | Key Deliverables |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | Initial Planning & Setup | API definitions, database schema approval. |
| **Tuesday** | Core Feature Development | User interface components and data layer. |
| **Wednesday** | **Testing & Integration** | QA rounds on feature stability. |
| **Thursday** | **Bug Fixes & Deployment Prep** | Refactoring code based on feedback. |
| **Friday** | Final QA & Handover | Sign-off documentation and staging environment verification. |

*Note: All meetings and sprint cycles are open for remote participation. Critical blockers will be communicated immediately via project management tools.*<|im_end|>

final_answer:
### One-Week Software Development Schedule
**Project Focus:** New App Feature Launch  
**Duration:** 5 Working Days (Mon – Fri)

| Time | Activity | Details |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **09:00 – 10:30** | **Team Stand-up** | Daily sync on progress and blockers. |
| **10:30 – 11:30** | **Planning & Review** | Code review sessions for pull requests. |
| **11:30 – 13:30** | **Collaborative Brainstorming Session** | Feature refinement and API design discussion. |
| **13:30 – 18:00** | **Coding Sprint** | Full development implementation. |
| **14:00 – 15:00** | **Lunch Break** | Unplugged time and snacks. |
| **18:00 – 18:30** | **Wrap-up Report** | Logging bugs and next steps. |

---

| Day | Primary Focus | Key Deliverables |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | Initial Planning & Setup | API definitions, database schema approval. |
| **Tuesday** | Core Feature Development | User interface components and data layer. |
| **Wednesday** | **Testing & Integration** | QA rounds on feature stability. |
| **Thursday** | **Bug Fixes & Deployment Prep** | Refactoring code based on feedback. |
| **Friday** | Final QA & Handover | Sign-off documentation and staging environment verification. |

*Note: All meetings and sprint cycles are open for remote participation. Critical blockers will be communicated immediately via project management tools.*<|im_end|>
